# datadog_role_permissions (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve the list of permissions assigned to a Datadog role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get the API Key Manager role
data "datadog_role" "api_key_manager" {
  filter = "API Key Manager"
}

# List permissions assigned to the API Key Manager role
data "datadog_role_permissions" "api_key_manager_permissions" {
  role_id = data.datadog_role.api_key_manager.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (String) The role's identifier.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `permissions` (List of Object) List of permissions assigned to the role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions))

<a id="nestedatt--permissions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permissions`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `permission_id` (String)
